natural_language: Team wants ChatGPT Enterprise for document summarization.

claims.text: OpenAI DPA for this entity is unsigned; no approval until executed.

natural_language: The DPA with OpenAI is not signed for our entity. Procurement veto: no approval until the DPA is executed and the subprocessor list is attached.
Even setting risk aside, I cannot clear a US transfer without a signed DPA and TIA.
Veto stands until the DPA is signed.
